use_cases: Displaying user profile previews when hovering over avatar or username links
Showing detailed product information on e-commerce category pages
Revealing contextual help or tooltips for complex form fields
Previewing links or media content without leaving the current page
Displaying author or source information in content-heavy applications
ai_summary: A lightweight hover card component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind styling. Displays contextual content that appears on mouse hover with smooth fade and scale animations. Features a clean, minimal design with a shadow, border, and rounded corners that fits seamlessly into any application needing non-intrusive preview or tooltip functionality.
